calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok and S. Vantree. Proceedings reported by Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840. (514)

Daniel R. Stern, Esq., for the Plaintiff Parkmerced Owner, LLC A Delaware Limited Liability.
Witness, Donna Stern, sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant(s) Cameron Uribe, Cameron Davis-Loper, Armando Castenada, Tawny Koening, Jessica Iacobelli.

Plaintiff's Exhibit A- Residential Agreement.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The lease is forfeited. Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 310 Arballo Dr. #5-H, San Francisco, California 94132.

Damages $13,778.02
Holdover damages $0
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $2200.00
Costs $0
for a Total Judgment of $15,978.02

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Assigned To Trial Court
